## Checklist

- [ ] Sources cited on every changed page.
- [ ] Status is honest (`required`, `recommended`, `optional`, `avoid`).
- [ ] Platform-agnostic — outcomes, not implementations.
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally.
- [ ] No accidental dependencies added.
